query.original: Can you use Action Surge to cast two leveled spells in one turn?
query.used: Can you use Action Surge to cast two leveled spells in one turn?

#### Quickened Spell

When you cast a spell that has a casting time of 1 action, you can spend 2 sorcery points to change the casting time to 1 bonus action for this casting.

#### Empowered Spell

When you roll damage for a spell, you can spend 1 sorcery point to reroll a number of the damage dice up to your Charisma modifier (minimum of one). You must use the new rolls.

### Extra Attack

Beginning at 5th level, you can attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

answer: I cannot find this in the provided rules that you can use Action Surge to cast two leveled spells in one turn. Action Surge allows you to take an additional action on top of your regular action and a possible bonus action. However, casting a spell is considered a single action, so you cannot use Action Surge to cast two leveled spells in one turn.

correctness.feedback: The generated answer is relevant to the user query but contains incorrect information regarding the use of Action Surge and casting leveled spells. It incorrectly states that you cannot use Action Surge to cast two leveled spells, which contradicts the reference answer.
